title: Heap Queries
hints: Use a min heap (PriorityQueue in Java) to maintain the elements.
For each query, check if P = 1 (extract min) or P = 2 (insert).
When P = 1 and Q = -1, pop the minimum element if heap is not empty, otherwise return -1.
When P = 2, insert Q into the heap.
Collect all results from extract min operations in an array and return it.
